top_signals.title: Cantor, Adam Back’s BSTR Seek New Terms for Bitcoin SPAC Merger
top_signals.summary: A Cantor Fitzgerald-backed blank-check company and Adam Back’s Bitcoin investment company scrapped the original terms of their planned merger and will negotiate a revised deal, as a tougher market for crypto challenges Bitcoin treasury companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Ubiquiti warns of new max severity  UniFi OS vulnerability
top_signals.summary: Ubiquiti has released security updates to patch seven critical vulnerabilities in UniFi OS, including a maximum-severity flaw that can be exploited in command injection attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
